export default function HeroSection({ onExplore }) { return (
India's #1 Media Buying Platform

Build your next campaign with a live media marketplace.

Discover premium ad inventory across airports, cinema, digital, radio, outdoor, influencers and more—without leaving the homepage.

{[ ['15+ Channels', 'Full media coverage'], ['10K+ Brands', 'Trusted by top advertisers'], ['3.5L+ Options', 'Live inventory snapshots'], ].map(([value, label]) => (
{value}
{label}
))}
Campaign Summary
Airport Screens₹45,000
Cinema Ads₹25,000
Digital Masthead₹120,000
Radio Jingle₹30,000
Total Budget ₹2,20,000
); } const S = { container: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '1.1fr 0.9fr', gap: 32, padding: '64px 60px 40px', alignItems: 'center', background: 'radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(0,212,180,0.16), transparent 35%), #0a0f1a', }, heroLeft: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 24, maxWidth: 620 }, badge: { alignSelf: 'flex-start', background: 'rgba(0,212,180,0.12)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,212,180,0.25)', color: '#00d4b4', borderRadius: 999, padding: '8px 16px', fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, letterSpacing: 0.8, textTransform: 'uppercase' }, title: { fontFamily: 'Syne,sans-serif', fontSize: 'clamp(3rem, 5vw, 5.2rem)', lineHeight: 1.02, margin: 0, color: '#fff' }, description: { maxWidth: 540, fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 1.8, color: '#8fa3c0' }, ctaRow: { display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 14 }, primaryBtn: { background: 'linear-gradient(135deg,#00d4b4,#00b89c)', border: 'none', color: '#000', borderRadius: 14, padding: '14px 28px', fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 700, cursor: 'pointer' }, secondaryBtn: { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,212,180,0.18)', color: '#8fa3c0', borderRadius: 14, padding: '14px 28px', fontSize: 15, cursor: 'pointer' }, statsBar: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(3, minmax(0,1fr))', gap: 12 }, statCard: { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,212,180,0.12)', borderRadius: 16, padding: 18, minWidth: 0 }, statValue: { fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 800, color: '#fff' }, statLabel: { fontSize: 12, color: '#8fa3c0', marginTop: 6, lineHeight: 1.5 }, heroRight: { display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center' }, previewCard: { width: '100%', maxWidth: 420, background: 'rgba(13,27,46,0.92)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,212,180,0.18)', borderRadius: 22, padding: 28, boxShadow: '0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)' }, previewHead: { fontSize: 12, color: '#8fa3c0', textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: 1.4, marginBottom: 22 }, previewBody: { display: 'grid', gap: 16 }, previewRow: { display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', color: '#e8f0fe', fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600 }, previewFooter: { marginTop: 24, paddingTop: 18, borderTop: '1px solid rgba(0,212,180,0.12)', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', color: '#00d4b4', fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700 }, };
